data.label: traceroute
data.description: Rust 的跨平台 traceroute 库。Libtraceroute 是一个用于 Rust 的跨平台 traceroute 库，可用于显示可能的路由（路径），并测量数据包在 IP 网络中的传输延迟。

data.label: traceroute
data.description: Cross-platform traceroute library for Rust. Libtraceroute is a cross-platform traceroute library for Rust, that allows displaying possible routes (paths) and measuring transit delays of packets across an Internet Protocol (IP) network.
